data.title: Canada Fines KuCoin $14M for Anti-Money Laundering Failures
data.description:
Canada’s financial intelligence agency has fined the operator of KuCoin C$19. 6 million (US$14. 09 million), the largest anti-money laundering penalty.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/canada-fines-kucoin-14m-for-anti-money-laundering-failures/

data.title: Rising U.S. Treasury Yields Pose Challenges to AI Investment Boom
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, Panmure Liberum strategist Joachim Klement has highlighted the significant investments being made by tech giants in artificial intelligence, which are contributing to the ongoing rise in U.S. stock markets. However, the increasing yields on long-term U.S. Treasury bonds are threatening the investment surge in infrastructure such as data centers. The challenge for AI investments lies in the substantial funding required, much of which depends on debt financing. Since 2023, long-term Treasury yields have risen significantly, with a recent slight decline, and are expected to continue increasing through 2026. This trend will elevate debt costs, rendering some investment projects unprofitable.

Data indicates that for every 1% increase in long-term Treasury yields, the growth rate of IT equipment investment may decrease by 0.6%, while software investment growth could decline by 0.4%. Although higher Treasury yields will not completely stifle growth, they will inevitably cause delays. Given that current valuations already reflect overly optimistic expectations, this could lead to downward revisions in earnings forecasts for large-scale enterprises and other growth stocks.

data.title: Binance to List Falcon Finance (FF) on Sept. 29 — BNB HODLer Airdrop Live for Eligible Users
data.description: Key pointsFalcon Finance (FF) is the 46th Binance HODLer Airdrops project.Listing: Sept. 29, 2025 at 13:00 UTC with USDT, USDC, BNB, FDUSD, TRY pairs.Airdrop eligibility window: Sept. 14–16 (UTC) for BNB Simple Earn (Flexible/Locked) and On-Chain Yields subscribers.Airdrop pool: 150,000,000 FF (1.5% of max supply).Deposits open: Sept. 26, 10:00 UTC. Seed Tag applies at listing.What is Falcon Finance (FF)?Falcon Finance is a universal collateralization infrastructure designed to power onchain liquidity and yield across ecosystems.Token & Listing DetailsToken: Falcon Finance (FF)Total/Max Supply: 10,000,000,000 FFCirculating at listing: 2,340,000,000 FF (23.40%)HODLer Airdrops: 150,000,000 FF (1.50%)Future marketing allocation: 150,000,000 FF (in ~6 months)Contracts:BNB Smart Chain: 0xAC23B90A79504865D52B49B327328411a23d4dB2Ethereum: 0xFA1C09fC8B491B6A4d3Ff53A10CAd29381b3F949Listing fee: 0Research report: “Falcon Finance (FF)” (within 48 hours of this announcement)Note: FF will also be tradable on Binance Alpha (time TBA), but will no longer be showcased on Alpha after spot trading opens.How the HODLer Airdrop WorksBNB holders who subscribed to Simple Earn (Flexible/Locked) and/or On-Chain Yields between Sept. 14, 00:00 UTC and Sept. 16, 23:59 UTC are eligible.Binance uses randomized historical snapshots of balances to calculate allocations.Distribution: To users’ Spot Accounts at least 1 hour before trading starts.BNB Holding Hard Cap applies: user share capped at 4% of total average BNB pool.Quick Start (for future airdrops)Go to Earn → search BNB.Subscribe to Simple Earn (Flexible/Locked) and/or On-Chain Yields.Snapshots are taken multiple times hourly; rewards are retroactive—no extra actions required.

data.title: Trump signs executive order on TikTok, Ministry of Foreign Affairs responds
data.description: Foreign Ministry Spokesperson Guo Jiakun presided over a regular press conference. Guo Jiakun stated, "I want to reiterate that China's position on the TikTok issue is clear. The Chinese government respects the wishes of businesses and welcomes them to conduct commercial negotiations based on market rules and reach solutions that comply with Chinese laws and regulations and balance interests. We hope that the United States will provide an open, fair, and non-discriminatory business environment for Chinese companies to invest in the United States." (CCTV News)

data.title: Hypervault Finance experienced abnormal withdrawals worth approximately $3.6 million
data.description: According to PeckShieldAlert, Hypervault Finance experienced an unusual withdrawal of approximately $3.6 million. The funds were bridged from Hyperliquid to Ethereum, converted to ETH, and 752 ETH were deposited into Tornado Cash.

data.title: Japan to open new facility backing $550B U.S. trade deal
data.description:
Japan’s finance ministry plans to establish an investment facility at a state-owned development bank to support a $550B trade agreement with the U. S.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/japan-to-open-new-facility/

data.title: USDC Treasury Destroys 55 Million Tokens on Ethereum Blockchain
data.description: According to PANews, Whale Alert has reported that the USDC Treasury has destroyed 55 million USDC tokens on the Ethereum blockchain. This significant action reflects ongoing adjustments within the digital currency landscape. The destruction of tokens is a common practice used to manage the supply and value of cryptocurrencies. Such measures can influence market dynamics and investor sentiment, highlighting the evolving nature of digital asset management.

data.title: Binance Alpha: Mira Network (MIRA) Phase 1 Airdrop Threshold: 196 Points
data.description: Binance Alpha will list Mira Network (MIRA), with Alpha trading commencing at 18:00 (UTC+8) on September 26, 2025. Eligible Binance users can use their Binance Alpha Points to claim a 100-point airdrop of MIRA tokens on the Alpha event page within 24 hours of the start of trading. The Binance Alpha airdrop will be distributed in two phases: Phase 1 (first 18 hours): Users with at least 196 Alpha Points will be eligible to claim. Phase 2 (last 6 hours): Users with at least 150 Alpha Points will be eligible to participate in the second phase of the airdrop, on a first-come, first-served basis. The minimum score will automatically decrease by 15 points every hour for the duration of the event. Claiming the airdrop will cost 15 Binance Alpha Points. Users must confirm their claim within 24 hours on the Alpha event page; otherwise, they will forfeit the airdrop.

data.title: An address sold WBTC and AAVE and bought $4.25 million worth of HYPE
data.description: According to on-chain analyst Ai Yi's monitoring, a certain address (0x4F1...618B) sold $4.84 million worth of WBTC and $2.838 million worth of AAVE 3 hours ago, then deposited 4.692 million USDC into Hyperliquid and bought 101,000 HYPE worth $4.25 million.

data.title: Funds from Hypervault Transferred to Tornado Cash
data.description: According to Foresight News, CertiK Alert has reported that funds from Hypervault have been withdrawn and deposited into Tornado Cash. Approximately 752 ETH, equivalent to around $3.6 million, were transferred from HyperEVM to Ethereum network addresses starting with "0xd74eA7" and "0xee882". Additionally, it was noted that the project's website and social media accounts are currently inactive.

data.title: Korean actor handed suspended prison term for embezzling $3 million to invest in crypto
data.description:
Korean actor Hwang Jung-eum was sentenced to two years in prison, suspended for four years, for embezzling $3 million to invest in crypto.
source: https://www.theblock.co/post/372490/korean-drama-star-gets-suspended-prison-term-embezzling-invest-crypto?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss

data.title: Binance Alpha will list Hana Network (HANA) at 7:00 PM today, with an airdrop threshold of 200 points.
data.description: Binance Alpha is the first platform to list the Hana Network (HANA). Trading on Alpha will begin at 7:00 PM (UTC+8) on September 26, 2025. After trading begins, users with at least 200 Alpha Points will be eligible to claim a 270 HANA token airdrop. This airdrop is available on a first-come, first-served basis. The minimum score will automatically decrease by 15 points every hour until the event ends. Please note that claiming the airdrop will cost 15 Binance Alpha Points. Users must confirm their claim within 24 hours on the Alpha event page; otherwise, they will forfeit the airdrop.

data.title: xAI Files Lawsuit Against OpenAI Over Alleged Code Theft
data.description: According to Foresight News, xAI, a company led by Elon Musk, has filed a lawsuit against OpenAI, accusing it of encouraging former employees to steal source code and data center deployment strategies. xAI claims that OpenAI specifically targeted employees who possessed knowledge of its 'core secrets' related to data center operations. One executive, after moving to OpenAI, reportedly refused to sign a confidentiality agreement. Additionally, an engineer allegedly admitted to misappropriating code through a handwritten confession after encrypted communications with OpenAI recruiters.

data.title: Peter Schiff: MSTR's stock price has fallen 45% from its November 2024 high, and Bitcoin treasury companies may find it difficult to survive the bear market
data.description: Economist and cryptocurrency critic Peter Schiff wrote on X: “While many companies are busy copying Michael Saylor’s business strategy, few have noticed that MSTR has fallen 45% from its November 2024 high. This will be a brutal bear market for Bitcoin treasury companies. I’m not sure any of them can survive, including MSTR.”

data.title: Binance Alpha has opened the second phase of XPL airdrop applications, with a minimum score of 100 points.
data.description: Binance Alpha has opened the second phase of its XPL airdrop. The minimum points requirement is 100. 180 XPL tokens, currently valued at $226.8, are available for claiming. Applications are accepted on a first-come, first-served basis. The minimum points requirement will automatically decrease by 15 points every hour until the event ends. Claiming the airdrop will cost 15 Binance Alpha points.

data.title: Elon Musk's xAI Sues OpenAI Again, This Time Over Alleged Trade Secret Theft
data.description:
The lawsuit alleges OpenAI orchestrated a "coordinated campaign" to steal xAI's source code and data center secrets.
source: https://decrypt.co/341517/elon-musks-xai-sues-openai-again-this-time-over-alleged-trade-secret-theft
